## Skill name and maintainer

<!-- For existing skills: name + current maintainer (meko or community) -->
<!-- For new skills: proposed name + set maintainer: community in your SKILL.md -->

## What skill do you want to add or change?

<!-- One-sentence description of what it teaches -->

## Why is this needed?

<!-- What failure mode does this fix? What does the agent do wrong without it? -->

## What harness / use case is this for?

<!-- Cursor / Claude Code / Claude Desktop / agent framework / other -->

## Draft instruction text (optional)

<!-- If you have a rough version of the SKILL.md content, paste it here -->

## Have you tested this?

<!-- Yes / No — if yes, describe briefly how you verified it works -->
